flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SOWELA Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at SOWELA Technical Community College fell 51% between 2009 and 2012 ($7.1k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SOWELA Technical Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 3.0k).
